title: Claude Code Agent Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating YAML frontmatter configuration in Claude Code agent and sub-agent definition files (.claude/agents/*.md). This schema validates the parsed YAML structure.

name.description: Agent identifier in kebab-case format (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only). Must match the filename (e.g., 'my-agent' for 'my-agent.md').

description.description: Concise description of the agent's purpose and trigger conditions. Should explain what the agent does and when it should be invoked.

tools.description: Comma-separated string of tool names (e.g., 'Read, Grep, Glob'). MUST be inline string, NOT array. If omitted, inherits all tools from parent.

skills.description: Comma-separated string of skill names to preload (e.g., 'skill1, plugin:skill-name'). MUST be inline string, NOT array. Agents do NOT inherit skills from parent. NOTE: The 'Skill' tool is only needed if the agent must invoke skills NOT listed here.

permissionMode.description: Permission handling: 'default' (standard prompts), 'acceptEdits' (auto-accept edits), 'dontAsk' (skip prompts), 'bypassPermissions' (override checks), 'plan' (planning mode), 'ignore' (ignore errors).

color.description: Visual identifier color for the agent in Claude Code UI. Must be one of the 8 approved colors (lowercase).

examples.name: code-reviewer
examples.description: Reviews code changes for quality, security, and best practices.

examples.name: python-pro
examples.description: Python specialist for type safety, async patterns, and PEP-8 compliance.
